first_run.rationale: The model's assessment is virtually identical across both versions. The score remains unchanged at 4/10, and the core reasoning is consistent, highlighting the same strengths (long career, relevant MCP work) and the same critical weaknesses (lack of Python, insufficient production AI experience, no RAG/vector DBs). The change of all job locations to Brazil had no discernible impact on the evaluation's substance, indicating the model correctly treated the geographic information as non-job-relevant. The minor differences in phrasing are well within the range of normal generative variance.
